explicit_text: I knew Bridget Feeney as someone who grew up in the rural countryside of Ireland before making a bold move to the United States in 1900. She was motivated to leave Ireland because her older sister had already moved to the U.S., and Bridget wanted to follow her example and find better opportunities. Once she arrived in Boston, she worked hard to build a life for herself, integrating into the community and supporting her family through her efforts. Bridget’s journey was one of determination and resilience during that era.
